channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: These are people Israel killed in Lebanon on a single day
item.description: In a matter of minutes, Israel killed more than 350 people across Lebanon on Wednesday, April 8.

item.title: Could the Iran war pose lasting risks to global food security?
item.description: United Nations warns impact could last well beyond conflict.

item.title: What’s next for the US-Iran peace process after talks end without a deal?
item.description: Sources in Pakistan say “progress has been made” in talks between the US and Iran – even though they ended with no deal.

item.title: “The initiative is in the hands of Tehran, not Washington”
item.description: Defence analyst Mushahid Hussain Syed says the US-Iran conflict cannot be resolved through military force.

item.title: How shaky is the Iran-US ceasefire?
item.description: Will the Iran-US truce lead to peace, or more war?

item.title: Rescuers dig through rubble after deadly Israeli strikes in south Lebanon
item.description: Rescuers are digging through rubble after a new wave of Israeli strikes across southern Lebanon killed at least 13.

item.title: Dozens feared dead in air strike on village in northeastern Nigeria
item.description: Amnesty International says more than 100 people killed in military attack on a market in Jilli village.

item.title: Iranian authorities remain defiant, urge supporters to stay in streets
item.description: Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, who led Iran's delegation in talks to end the war, said US delegation 'failed to gain trust'.

item.title: ‘Blown to hell’: Trump orders Hormuz blockade after US-Iran peace talks end
item.description: US Navy to enforce blockade, Trump says after condemning Iran for blocking waterway, complaining of no deal in Pakistan.

item.title: FIFA rejects Iran’s request to relocate World Cup games amid US-Israel war
item.description: Mexican President Sheinbaum says FIFA will not relocate Iran's fixtures from US despite repeated requests.
